name: Caramel-Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pecans evenly in the unbaked pastry shell.
2. Sprinkle chocolate pieces over the pecans.
3. Drizzle caramel topping over the chocolate.
4. Set aside.
5. In a medium mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sour cream, sugar, and vanilla extract.
6. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
7. Add eggs, beating on low speed just until combined.
8. Pour the mixture over the caramel topping in the crust.
9. Bake in a 350 degree F oven for about 45 minutes or until the center appears set.
10. Cool on a wire rack.
11. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
12. Sift cocoa powder over pie, if desired.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
